name: Nikto
description: Web server vulnerability scanner powered by the Nikto CLI
long_description: Runs Nikto with SecuScan-managed parameters for authorized web server assessment. This modernizes the classic "nikto -h target" workflow into a signed plugin with safe argument construction, presets, JSON output, and fallback parsing for traditional Nikto text reports.

fields.label: Target Host / URL

validation.message: Enter a hostname, IPv4 address, or full HTTP/HTTPS URL.

fields.help: Nikto -h target. Accepts hostnames, IPv4 addresses, or full HTTP/HTTPS URLs.

fields.label: Port List / Range

validation.message: Use comma-separated ports or numeric ranges such as 80,443 or 8000-8100.

fields.help: Nikto -port for single, multiple, or ranged ports.

fields.label: Nikto Tuning Codes

validation.message: Use only Nikto tuning codes 0-9, a, b, c, and x.

fields.help: Nikto -Tuning string. 0 upload, 1 log file, 2 default file, 3 disclosure, 4 injection, 5 file retrieval in web root, 6 DoS, 7 server-wide file retrieval, 8 command execution, 9 SQLi, a auth bypass, b software ID, c remote source inclusion, x reverse selection.

fields.label: Max Scan Time (seconds)

validation.message: Use a max scan time between 30 and 7200 seconds.

fields.help: Maps to Nikto -maxtime and the SecuScan process timeout.

fields.label: Run Until
fields.help: Optional Nikto -until value. Use a relative duration or an absolute stop time supported by your Nikto install.

fields.label: Request Timeout (seconds)

validation.message: Use a per-request timeout between 1 and 300 seconds.

fields.help: Maximum wait time for each target request.

fields.label: Virtual Host

validation.message: Enter a valid hostname or leave it blank.

fields.help: Nikto -vhost Host header override for virtual-hosted targets.

fields.label: Custom User Agent
fields.help: Optional User-Agent string sent by Nikto.

fields.label: Proxy Address
fields.help: Nikto -useproxy value for routing requests through an upstream proxy.

fields.label: Display Flags
fields.help: Nikto -Display codes. 1 redirects, 2 cookies, 3 HTTP 200s, 4 auth URLs, D debug, E HTTP errors, P print progress, V verbose.

fields.label: Safe Mode
fields.help: Keep SecuScan guardrails enabled for conservative target validation.

fields.label: Force SSL
fields.help: Pass Nikto -ssl for hosts that need SSL forced by port or hostname.

fields.label: Disable SSL
fields.help: Pass Nikto -nossl to stop using SSL during the scan.

fields.label: Follow Redirects
fields.help: Follow HTTP redirects during the scan.

fields.label: Skip DNS Lookup
fields.help: Pass Nikto -nolookup when DNS resolution is unnecessary or already controlled.

fields.label: Disable Caching
fields.help: Pass Nikto -nocache to disable scan response caching.

fields.label: Database Check
fields.help: Pass Nikto -dbcheck before execution. Useful for validating local Nikto databases.

fields.label: Update Nikto Plugins
fields.help: Pass Nikto -update before the task. This is a maintenance action and may ignore the scan target depending on Nikto behavior.

safety.consent_message: Nikto sends active web probes and can trigger security monitoring. Only scan targets where you have explicit authorization.
